LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MINT DEVELOPMENT, L.P'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF MCH ELECTRIC, INC.'S COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. A CLAIMANT MUST GIVE PRELIMINARY NOTICE TO THE PROPERTY OWNER, DIRECT CONTRACTOR, AND CONSTRUCTION LENDER. (CIVIL CODE 8200(A); ADDED BY STATS.2010, C. 697 (S.B.189), 20, OPERATIVE JULY 1, 2012).) COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 8200 IS A "NECESSARY PREREQUISITE TO THE VALIDITY OF A LIEN CLAIM OR . . . CLAIM AGAINST PAYMENT BOND UNDER THIS TITLE." ( 8200(B-C).) A MECHANICS' LIEN IS NOT PERFECTED UNTIL THESE STATUTORY REQUIREMENTS ARE MET. (KIM V. JF ENTERPRISES (1996) 42 CAL.APP.4TH 849, 854.) SECTION 8900 INDICATES THAT THE LEGISLATURE SEEKS STRICT COMPLIANCE WITH NOTICE REQUIREMENTS FOR A MECHANIC'S LIEN. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chad Snyder of Doerksen Taylor LLP telephone number 559-233-3434 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff MCH Electric.
Patrick Whitehorn of Last & Faoro telephone number 650-696-8350 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MINT DEVELOPMENT, L.P'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF MCH ELECTRIC, INC.'S COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. A claimant must give preliminary notice to the property owner, direct contractor, and construction lender. (Civil Code 8200(a); added by Stats.2010, c. 697 (S.B.189), 20, operative July 1, 2012).) Compliance with section 8200 is a "necessary prerequisite to the validity of a lien claim or . . . claim against payment bond under this title." ( 8200(b-c).) A mechanics' lien is not perfected until these statutory requirements are met. (Kim v. JF Enterprises (1996) 42 Cal.App.4th 849, 854.) Section 8900 indicates that the legislature seeks strict compliance with notice requirements for a mechanic's lien. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Continued To Jan-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT MINT DEVELOPMENT, L.P'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 20, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 6, 2016 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
